message:
fix(search): make reindex transactional and fix watermark over-advance on rate limiting

Snapshot state before reindex and restore on error, preventing partial
failures from corrupting index state. Extract apply_watermark_updates()
helper and defer watermark updates until after successful ingest. When
docs are rate-limited, only advance watermarks for the handled prefix,
preventing over-advance past unprocessed documents.

Add 4 tests: state rollback on corrupted index, no watermark advance
on ingest failure, partial watermark advance on rate limiting, and
multi-pane partial advance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
